economic_notes: Nation holds equity interests in 16 commercial enterprises and partnerships including hydroelectric projects (Ouiatchouan and Mistassini SECs), forestry/biomass (Biochar Boréalis, Namunashu SEC), cultural site (Shipiss inc.), and various development corporations. Total equity value in GBEs is $82,353,167. Long-term debt largely tied to hydroelectric investments via Investissement Quebec.
notes: Fiscal year ending March 31, 2020. Financial statements are 'combined' (états financiers combinés) rather than consolidated. 16 commercial enterprises and partnerships are accounted for using the modified equity method (GBEs), not fully consolidated. The equity pickup from these entities ($5,428,747 in 2020) is shown as a separate line below operating surplus. Revenue breakdown by line not available in extracted text — only total revenues shown. Deferred revenue includes $1,910,682 general + $2,592,840 housing programs. Long-term debt includes $62,248,966 general + $1,314,346 housing (Art. 95). Restricted cash includes $379,172 CMHC housing reserves + $6,933,936 band funds held in federal treasury. Prior year comparative figures included. Remuneration schedule noted as unaudited annex but values not extracted from text provided. ISC and government transfer breakdown not available from income statement text alone — contributions receivable note shows federal sources including SAC of $6,279,411 but full revenue breakdown not disclosed in extracted text.
